name: Pasta Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Tasso or smoked sausage, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the sausages and cook until browned, breaking them into smaller pieces as they cook.
3. Add the diced chicken to the skillet and cook until the chicken is no longer pink.
4. Stir in the chopped green pepper, red onion, and minced garlic.
5. Sprinkle Creole seasoning over the ingredients and stir well.
6. Melt the butter in the skillet, then add it to the mixture.
7. Cook for a few minutes until everything is heated through and combined.
8. Add the cooked three-colored pasta to the skillet and toss gently to combine with the sauce.
9. Serve the pasta jambalaya hot, topped with grated provolone and gouda cheeses.
